strategy: Expect her minions to mirror her. Whenever she buffs herself, her minions cheat-cast the same type (Global to Stormblade, aura, trap, or blade), so kill or blade past the shared buffs on one big hit.
Bring Fire. She is Ice and takes 30% boosted Fire while resisting Ice 75%, Storm 63%, and most schools 45%, so a Fire hitter or Fire prisms is the clear pick.

Play around the forced-cast cycle. She forces a random wizard to cast a hanging effect (Elemental Weakness, deferred Fire DoTs, Life HoTs, or Spirit Blade), then two rounds later removes those effects and deals 10% of that wizard's max Health per effect cleared.
Do not pile extra hanging effects on the forced wizard. The punishment scales per hanging effect cleared, so minimize what stacks on them before the removal round.
Watch her random Chain Lightning interrupts and the minion buff mirror when timing your setup; shield the forced wizard ahead of the removal round.
This is a team fight: 20,220 Health. Funnel blades to one Fire hitter, have supports Feint her, keep a healer on the forced-cast target, and burst her down in one window.
cheatNotes: Whenever she casts a buff, her minions cheat-cast a matching buff of the same type, so her side stacks buffs quickly.
A Global she casts is mirrored by the minions as Stormblade.
An aura she casts is mirrored as Magnify, Sleet Storm, or Empowerment.
A trap she casts is mirrored as Ice Trap or Storm Trap.
A blade she casts is mirrored as Balanceblade, Iceblade (+45%), or Stormblade.
She randomly interrupts to cheat-cast Chain Lightning, so expect surprise Storm damage.
She forces a random wizard to cast one of four hanging effects, setting up the delayed punishment below.
The forced effect may be a -15% Elemental Weakness.
The forced effect may be three Fire DoTs that each deal 50 after 5 rounds.
The forced effect may be three Life HoTs that each restore 50 over 5 rounds.
The forced effect may be a +15% Spirit Blade.
Two rounds after forcing the cast, she removes those hanging effects and deals 10% of the forced wizard's max Health per effect cleared, so keep extra effects off that wizard and shield them.
